name: Enphase Energy, Inc.
description: Enphase Energy, Inc. is a global energy technology company and the world's leading supplier of microinverter-based solar-plus-storage systems. The company revolutionized the solar industry by bringing a systems-based approach to solar energy, leveraging its semiconductor-based microinverter to convert energy at the individual solar module level. Enphase's smart, easy-to-use solutions integrate solar generation, storage, and energy management into a single platform, providing homeowners and businesses with reliable, efficient, and sustainable energy. Headquartered in Fremont, California, Enphase continues to innovate in home energy management and grid services.
